objective: Run the repaired checked-in full 47-row Lite and Lite React benchmark protocol for exact baseline product 293dcdf2 versus candidate be78c8be and determine whether confirmed regressions remain zero.

predeclared_method.baseline_overlay: Cherry-pick only benchmark-control commit be78c8be onto detached baseline 293dcdf2, then prove pkg/core/lite and pkg/react/lite-react source paths remain byte-identical to 293dcdf2 and benchmark-control hashes match candidate.
predeclared_method.fallback: Only if the full five-pair comparator returns evidence_inconclusive, capture pairs 6 through 9 once in the checked-in continuing order and compare once after pair 9.
predeclared_method.capture: Use scripts/capture.mjs for each lane in its variant root and rebuild the named artifact before every capture.
predeclared_method.comparison: Use scripts/compare.mjs --mode full with the predeclared pair count.
predeclared_method.acceptance: All 47 rows present, semantic environment and artifact checks held, and confirmed_regression row count equals zero.

anti_goals: Do not edit product, benchmark, tests, docs, configuration, PR, or prior evidence after freeze.
Do not inspect partial comparisons or stop after pairs 6, 7, or 8.
Do not repeat a pair, row, lane, or capture until favorable.
Do not mix writers, controls, product artifacts, or semantic environments.
Do not claim the lifecycle target from the 47-row benchmark or the 47-row result from P15.
Do not merge, release, publish, or deploy.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
